title: Result - Norway
content:
Welcome to Norway, a northern European gem sharing borders with Sweden, Finland and Russia. Thanks to the Gulf Stream, Norway enjoys a milder climate than its location suggests. In summer, Northern Norway offers the magical "midnight sun," with 24 hours of daylight.
A leader in renewable energy and environmental technology, Norway is committed to sustainability and innovation. Explore breathtaking fjords, hike glaciers, or visit one of 44 free national parks. For thrill-seekers, Extreme Sports Week in Voss showcases activities like base jumping, kayaking and paragliding amidst stunning mountains, glaciers and lakes.

## Unique food tradition
Røkt laks (smoked salmon)
Norway has long been an innovative country and has expertise in areas such as oil and gas, energy, the maritime sector and seafood.

### Local legend or myth
Huldra: a woman in Norwegian folklore with a cow’s tail who lures men into the forest with her beauty and charm.

### Language of the Land
Norway has 2 official written languages that everybody has to learn: Bokmål and Nynorsk
kilometres of coastline, including thousands of islands, make Norway's coastline the longest of any European country.
The Bergen Matfestival Food Festival
